What is the bolt torque for the front wheel speed (ABS) sensor on the F-150?
answer_contains: the front wheel speed sensor. Torque : 150 lb.in (17 Nm)
answer: Front wheel speed sensor bolt: 150 lb.in (17 Nm)

question: What is the bolt torque for the rear wheel speed (ABS) sensor on the F-150?
answer_contains: the wheel speed sensor. Torque : 133 lb.in (15 Nm)
answer: Rear wheel speed sensor bolt: 133 lb.in (15 Nm)

question: What is the bolt torque for the parking brake actuator motor on an F-150 with electronic parking brake?
answer_contains: the parking brake actuator motor. Discard the bolts
answer: Parking brake actuator motor bolts: 71 lb.in (8 Nm) (discard the bolts)

question: What does diagnostic trouble code P0562 indicate on the F-150 charging system?
What does diagnostic trouble code P0620 indicate?
What does diagnostic trouble code P0626 indicate?
answer: P0626 - Generator Field/F Terminal Circuit High

question: What does diagnostic trouble code P0A5B indicate?
answer: P0A5B - Generator Current Sensor Circuit Low

question: What does diagnostic trouble code U0140 mean?
answer_contains: Lost Communication With Body Control Module
answer: U0140 - Lost Communication With Body Control Module

question: What does diagnostic trouble code U0121 indicate?
answer_contains: Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module
answer: U0121 - Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module

question: Which charging-system code is set when the F-150 detects that battery/system voltage is too low?
Which network code is stored when a module loses communication with the instrument panel cluster?
During A/C diagnosis, above what measured compressor clutch air gap must the gap be adjusted?
answer: Adjust if the clutch air gap is greater than 0.6 mm (0.0236 in), measured at 3 equally spaced locations between the clutch hub and the pulley.

question: What is the Motorcraft PAG refrigerant compressor oil specification number used in the F-150 A/C system?
answer: Motorcraft PAG Refrigerant Compressor Oil YN-12-D, specification WSH-M1C231-B.

question: Which compressor oil is the only oil permitted as the A/C refrigerant system lubricant?
answer_contains: PAG Refrigerant Compressor Oil YN-12-D only
answer: Only Motorcraft PAG Refrigerant Compressor Oil YN-12-D must be used; any other oil will damage the compressor and contaminate the system.

question: What should the A/C refrigerant system static pressure be at 24 degrees C with the engine off and cool?
answer: 413-551 kPa (60 - 80 psi) at 24 degrees C (75.2 degrees F).

question: Which special service tool is used to hold the A/C compressor clutch during air gap adjustment?
answer: Special Service Tool 412-134 Holding Tool, Compressor Clutch.

question: What R-134a refrigerant purity level (by weight) must be met to pass the refrigerant identification test before recovery?
answer: R-134a purity of 98% or greater by weight passes; below that it fails.

question: What is the Motorcraft A/C system flushing solvent specification for the F-150?
answer_contains: Motorcraft ® A/C System Flushing Solvent YN-23
answer: Motorcraft A/C System Flushing Solvent YN-23.

question: Which special service tool socket is used to remove and install the heated oxygen sensor (HO2S)?
answer: Special Service Tool 303-476 (T94P-9472-A) Socket, Exhaust Gas Oxygen Sensor

question: What lubricant must be applied to the threads of the heated oxygen sensor (HO2S) before installation?
answer: High Temperature Nickel Anti-Seize Lubricant / XL-2

question: What components make up the F-150 evaporative emission (EVAP) system?
answer: EVAP canister, EVAP canister purge valve, EVAP canister vent solenoid, Fuel Tank Pressure (FTP) sensor and tube, Easy Fuel (capless) fuel tank filler pipe

question: Which sensor in the EVAP system measures fuel tank pressure?
answer: Fuel Tank Pressure (FTP) sensor and tube

question: What does diagnostic trouble code P0463 indicate?
answer: P0463 - Fuel Level Sensor "A" Circuit High

question: What does diagnostic trouble code P0462 indicate?
answer: P0462 - Fuel Level Sensor "A" Circuit Low

question: What does diagnostic trouble code P25B0 indicate?

Which EVAP diagnostic trouble code is set when a small leak is detected in the evaporative emission system?
After correcting inner edge/shoulder tire wear, to what nominal toe value should the front toe be adjusted on the F-150?
answer: Adjust the toe to nominal +0.15 degrees (toe in)

answer_contains: accessory drive belt tensioner. Torque : 18 lb.ft (25 Nm)
answer: Accessory drive belt tensioner: 18 lb.ft (25 Nm)
